title: lotus siliquosus subsp. maritimus
intro: Lotus siliquosus subsp. maritimus, also known as the sea lotus or sea meadow sweet, is a subspecies of aquatic plant in the genus Lotus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Lotus siliquosus subsp. maritimus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to support various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
